heading: Where Data Becomes
body: From ETL pipelines to interactive dashboards — each project is a chance to solve something real.

projects.title: Automated News Discovery for Digital PR
projects.short: Identifies real-time news opportunities for PR campaigns using AI
projects.description:
- **Python** script integrated with the **Claude API** to pull and analyze real-time news across selected industries
- Classified stories as “recent” or “hot” to highlight the most time-sensitive opportunities
 - Generated and sent to the team every morning
 - Reduced manual research by filtering and surfacing high-potential topics, enabling faster and more consistent PR outreach

projects.title: Data-Driven PR Story Discovery Platform
projects.short: AI-powered platform for discovering data-backed Digital PR story opportunities
projects.description:
- A digital PR research platform powered by the **Claude API**, which identifies relevant publicly available datasets, reports, and studies based on a client’s company and industry context
- Systematically analyzes target industries and retrieves high-quality insights from trusted public data sources and recently published research
- Generates data-driven story ideas, including suggested headlines, tags, and concise summaries of key findings
- Delivered as an interactive dashboard using **Streamlit**, enabling users to search by company or topic and instantly surface relevant research insights
- Significantly reduced manual research effort by automating data discovery, filtering, and synthesis of high-potential PR opportunities
- Improved DPR workflow efficiency by centralizing research, idea generation, and story tracking in a single platform

projects.title: Restaurant Discovery Chatbot — London
projects.short: AI-powered chatbot for preference-based restaurant recommendations
projects.description:
- Scraped restaurant data from review platforms such as Time Out and Condé Nast Traveller, and stored it using **Google Firebase** and **Pinecone**
- Built a chatbot powered by an AI agent that dynamically queries the database based on user intent to deliver relevant restaurant recommendations
- Developed and deployed the backend API on **Google Cloud Run**
- Collaborated with a designer to build the frontend in **Webflow**, and integrated the API with the backend

projects.title: AI Teaching Assistant for Online Courses
projects.short: AI chatbot trained on course content to support student learning
projects.description:
- Built an AI chatbot in **Streamlit** using structured course content and topic data
- Designed to answer student questions based on the specific materials of an online course
- Provided contextual explanations to help students better understand concepts they are learning
- Deployed on **Streamlit Cloud** for easy access
- Reduced reliance on instructors by offering instant, course-specific support
- [Link](https://rubber-ducky.streamlit.app/)

projects.title: Automated Public Financial Data Pipeline
projects.short: Automates collection of financial data from major global institutions
projects.description:
- Built a **Python** script to automate retrieval of publicly available financial data
- Integrated with APIs from organizations such as *International Monetary Fund*, *Eurostat*, *OECD*, and *World Bank*
- Standardized and consolidated data from multiple sources into a unified format
- Reduced manual effort in sourcing and updating macroeconomic datasets
- Enabled faster analysis and easier access to reliable financial indicators

projects.title: OpenClaw Discord Bot
projects.short: AI-powered Discord bot for daily trading insights and forecast
projects.description:
- Built an AI agent using **OpenClaw** to track currency exchange trends and market developments - Pulled and analyzed latest news, current market conditions, and future outlook for selected currencies
- Connected the system to **Discord** to deliver updates in a simple, real-time interface
- Automated daily message delivery using a cron job at a scheduled time
